title: dalbergia retusa var. lineata
intro: Dalbergia retusa var. lineata, also known as the striped dalbergia, is a plant species belonging to the legume family and is native to parts of Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to combat infections and reduce pain. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infection. The plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder, and is used in herbal remedies to promote healing and alleviate various health conditions.
